DescribeAuthGroups.instanceId: The unique ID of the rapidFS instance to query
DescribeAuthGroups.filters: Filter conditions. See Appendix Filter. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic; multiple values within a filter are combined with OR logic. Supported fields: * name=authGroupId, e.g. value=["ag-AOLmxozuEqas", "ag-MuzHGS8WtjHq"]
DescribeAuthGroups.filters.name: The field to filter on. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic. Example: zone
DescribeAuthGroups.filters.values: The filter values for the field. Multiple values are combined with OR logic. Example: ["zoneA", "zoneB"]
DescribeAuthGroups.maxKeys: Maximum number of entries to return. Valid range: [1, 1000]. Default: 100
DescribeAuthGroups.marker: The starting position for paginated list retrieval. The returned list is sorted by authGroupId in lexicographic order. Set to the nextMarker value returned from the previous response
